message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracking database

Synchronize the beads_rust issue tracker state to the JSONL export.
Updates reflect progress on feature implementation, new specs added,
and status changes from multi-agent collaborative development.

The .beads/ directory maintains the authoritative issue state for
this project, enabling dependency-aware work selection via br ready
and bv --robot-triage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
